columns.column_name: Previous local therapy - N (%) | Prostatectomy | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not contain information about the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm who received prostatectomy as a previous local therapy.

columns.column_name: Previous local therapy - N (%) | Prostatectomy | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not contain information about the number and percentage of patients in the control arm who received prostatectomy as a previous local therapy.

columns.column_name: Previous local therapy - N (%) | Orchiectomy | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not contain information about the number and percentage of participants who received orchiectomy as a previous local therapy in the treatment arm of the clinical trial. The type of ADT (androgen deprivation therapy) is reported in Table 1, but not whether it was previous therapy.

columns.column_name: Previous local therapy - N (%) | Orchiectomy | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not contain information about the number and percentage of patients in the control arm of the trial who received previous local orchiectomy therapy. The type of ADT (androgen deprivation therapy) is reported in Table 1, but not whether it was previous therapy.

columns.column_name: Previous local therapy - N (%) | Radiotherapy | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not contain information about the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm who received radiotherapy as previous local therapy. The PDF reports on radiotherapy administered during the trial, not prior to it.

columns.column_name: Previous local therapy - N (%) | Radiotherapy | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not contain information about the number and percentage of patients in the control arm of the trial who received previous local radiotherapy. The PDF reports on radiotherapy administered during the trial, not prior to it.
